ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Order number generated for the customer */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., PENDING, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, RETURNED) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the default address for the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., RETURN, SHIPPED) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the order status was updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the order status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipping_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., SHIPPED, DELIVERED) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number provided by the shipping provider */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the carrier (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "rma_number" INTEGER /* RMA number for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was initiated */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Current status of the return (e.g., PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED) */,
  "return_cost" REAL /* Cost of the return (e.g., for return shipping) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refund_status" (
  "refund_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund status */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the return */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of the refund (e.g., REFUNDED, PENDING) */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was processed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the refund status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refund_status_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES returns ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refund_status_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount of the refund */,
  "refund_method" TEXT /* Method of refund (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  "refund_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund */,
  "is_partial" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the refund is partial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refunds_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES returns ("return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stripe_transactions" (
  "stripe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Stripe transaction */,
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the refund */,
  "stripe_charge_id" TEXT /* Stripe charge ID for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stripe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stripe_transactions_refund_id FOREIGN KEY ("refund_id") REFERENCES refunds ("refund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paypal_transactions" (
  "paypal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PayPal transaction */,
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the refund */,
  "paypal_transaction_id" TEXT /* PayPal transaction ID for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paypal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paypal_transactions_refund_id FOREIGN KEY ("refund_id") REFERENCES refunds ("refund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping provider */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping provider */,
  "provider_url" TEXT /* URL of the shipping provider for tracking links */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the shipping provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_providers_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer service, warehouse staff, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
